scene_input.scene_summary: Abū Buṣayr offers to kill his father's enemies

schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 255
schema_output.moral_lesson: Courage and loyalty in the face of danger

characters.name: Abū Buṣayr
characters.appearance: tall and strong build, wearing a simple white thobe and a brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering

characters.name: The central figure
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

schema_output.narrative_text: Abū Buṣayr stood before the Prophet Muhammad and said, 'I will go and kill my father's enemies.' The Prophet Muhammad looked at him with a serious expression and then said, 'Wait, let us think of a better way.'
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A vast, open desert area with sandy dunes and a few scattered palm trees in the distance. Late afternoon sunlight casts long shadows across the sandy ground, with the warm golden light of the setting sun casting a gentle glow. In the center of the scene, a young man, Abū Buṣayr, stands tall and strong, wearing a simple white thobe and a brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering. He has his right hand on the hilt of his sword, which is drawn and held firmly in his left hand. His face is not visible, but his posture conveys his determination and bravery. Behind him, the man in the green cloak stands seen entirely from behind, wearing a flowing white thobe and a deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades. The man in the green cloak's face is not visible, but his dignified posture and the deep green cloak convey his authority and wisdom. Soft warm golden light, serious and contemplative mood. Medium shot at eye level. Warm beige, golden, and sandy palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
_safety_changes: 'the central figure' -> 'the man in the green cloak'
